name: Payhip
description: Payhip creator-commerce API for coupons and license-key management. Payhip is useful for selling digital products through its hosted storefront, but its public API does not create products or upload downloadable audio files.

credential_fields.name: apiKey
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Payhip API key from your Payhip account settings.

credential_fields.name: productSecretKey
credential_fields.label: Product Secret Key
credential_fields.description: Optional product secret key used by Payhip's license-key endpoints.

tools.name: create_coupon
tools.description: Create a Payhip coupon. Use coupon_type='single' with product_key for one product, 'collection' with collection_id, or 'all' for all products.

start_date.description: Start date accepted by Payhip, for example YYYY-MM-DD.

end_date.description: End date accepted by Payhip, for example YYYY-MM-DD.

tools.name: verify_license
tools.description: Verify a Payhip product license key. Requires the Product Secret Key credential.

tools.name: disable_license
tools.description: Disable a Payhip license key. Requires the Product Secret Key credential.

tools.name: enable_license
tools.description: Enable a Payhip license key. Requires the Product Secret Key credential.

tools.name: increase_license_usage
tools.description: Increase or record usage for a Payhip license key. Requires the Product Secret Key credential.

tools.name: decrease_license_usage
tools.description: Decrease usage for a Payhip license key. Requires the Product Secret Key credential.
